Creative Strategy Summit 2026

The annual event for performance marketers to learn the workflows, tactics, and big bets shaping the future of creative strategy

Register for free

Free Virtual EventJune 24 & 25, 2026  •  1PM – 5PM ET

Featuring speakers from

The must-attend event
for DTC brands &
performance advertisers

Last year, AI doomerism was peaking, Andromeda had quietly changed everything, and creative strategy was evolving.

This year, the evolution has happened. The debates are over, the AI deniers are gone, and the best people have established creative operations rooted in three truths: AI is here to stay, Andromeda is not a problem to be solved, and the link between organic and paid social is stronger than ever.

Motion’s Creative Strategy Summit is where the industry’s best creative strategists, growth leaders, and agency operators gather to share what’s actually working.

Meet the Speakers

Hear from the operators behind some of the most effective campaigns in DTC as they share hard-earned lessons about what actually moves the needle in 2026.
